footer.tagline: E-commerce analytics made simple. Upload your data and get instant insights.

hero.title: E-commerce analytics
hero.description: Upload your store data and get instant dashboards and KPIs. No complex setup or technical knowledge required.

problem.title: Tired of spreadsheet chaos?
problem.description: Most e-commerce businesses waste hours exporting data and building spreadsheets. There’s a better way.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From raw data to clear decisions in three simple steps.

step1.title: Upload your data
step1.description: Export your store data and upload it. We support the most common formats.

step2.title: Get instant KPIs
step2.description: We automatically detect your data structure and generate relevant metrics.

step3.title: Explore and act
step3.description: Analyze dashboards, apply filters, and take action based on real data.

benefits.title: Why InsightFlow?
benefits.subtitle: Built for businesses that want clarity without complexity.

decisions.title: Data-driven decisions
decisions.description: Stop guessing and clearly see what’s working.

teams.title: Built for teams
teams.description: Share dashboards and align your team.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Powerful analytics without the learning curve.

upload.title: Simple data upload
upload.description: Drag and drop CSV, Excel, or JSON files.

ai.title: AI-powered insights
ai.description: Optional AI analysis to uncover trends and opportunities.

security.title: Enterprise-grade security
security.description: Multi-tenant architecture with full data isolation.

realtime.title: Real-time analytics
realtime.description: Track revenue, orders, and custom metrics.

export.title: Export & share
export.description: Save reports and share insights with your team.

cta.title: Ready to understand your store better?
cta.description: Start for free. No credit card required. See results in minutes.

tutorials.title: Tutorials & guides
tutorials.subtitle: Learn how to get the most out of InsightFlow with step-by-step guides.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
terms.subtitle: Legal terms governing the use of the CommerceIQ platform.

1.title: Identification
1.content: This document governs access to the SaaS platform CommerceIQ, owned by CommerceIQ, located in Madrid (Spain), contact email legal@commerceiq.ai.

2.title: Purpose
2.content: CommerceIQ provides SaaS software for automated business data analysis, dashboards, metrics, insights and AI-assisted features.

3.title: User status
3.content: Accessing the platform grants user status and implies full acceptance of these Terms.

4.title: Registration and access
4.content: Users must provide accurate information and keep credentials confidential.

5.title: Permitted use
5.content: Users must use the platform lawfully, in good faith and under these Terms.

6.title: Intellectual property
6.content: All software and content rights belong to CommerceIQ.

7.title: User data
7.content: Uploaded data is the sole responsibility of the user.

8.title: Artificial intelligence
8.content: AI features are informative only and do not guarantee accuracy.

9.title: Service availability
9.content: Service availability is not guaranteed uninterrupted.

10.title: Disclaimer of warranties
10.content: The service is provided as-is, without warranties.

11.title: Limitation of liability
11.content: CommerceIQ is not liable for indirect damages or business decisions.

12.title: Termination
12.content: Access may be suspended in case of breach.

13.title: Modifications
13.content: CommerceIQ may modify these Terms at any time.

14.title: Governing law
14.content: These Terms are governed by Spanish and EU law.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Information about personal data processing at CommerceIQ.

1.title: Data controller
1.content: The data controller is CommerceIQ, contact privacy@commerceiq.ai, Madrid, Spain.

2.title: Scope
2.content: This Policy governs personal data processing on the CommerceIQ platform.

3.title: Data types
3.content: Identification, business, analytical and technical data are processed.

4.title: Purpose
4.content: Data is processed to provide the service and generate insights.

5.title: Legal basis
5.content: Processing is based on contract performance, legal obligations and legitimate interest.

6.title: Processor role
6.content: CommerceIQ acts as data processor for customer-uploaded data.

7.title: Third-party services
7.content: Third-party cloud and AI providers may be used as subprocessors.

8.title: Data retention
8.content: Data is retained while the contractual relationship exists.

9.title: Recipients
9.content: No data is shared unless legally required.

10.title: Security
10.content: Reasonable technical and organizational measures are applied.

11.title: User rights
11.content: Users may exercise their rights via privacy@commerceiq.ai.

12.title: Liability exclusion
12.content: CommerceIQ is not responsible for business decisions based on the software.

13.title: Governing law
13.content: This Policy is governed by Spanish and EU law.
